affected_pattern: Scattered NULL fields across multiple customer records with no clear time pattern
root_cause: Database storage failure — the billing record storage database experienced intermittent connection pool exhaustion, preventing random billing records from being fully persisted.
supporting_evidence: Billing Record Failure RCA Playbook: Database Storage Failure pattern
Database connection pool exhaustion errors in system logs
Random pattern of failures (not correlated with time or customer segment)
recommended_action: Implement connection pool monitoring and alerting
Replay lost billing records from billing billing mediation layer buffer
Verify database health and storage capacity
